specific_mechanism: new Laplacian-eigenbasis attention module introducing new learnable eigenbasis parameters and new spectral bridge (new computation graph edges)
llm_application: new Laplacian-eigenbasis attention module: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new learnable eigenbasis parameters) implementing new Laplacian-eigenbasis attention module; the module adds new spectral bridge between existing layers, creating new graph attention pathway that the baseline lacks; module is NOT a function of existing parameters
